title: EmploymentType enum seed
description: Canonical employment-type taxonomy. Consumed at boot by `EmploymentType` enum registration + by the HirePlatformUserInput validator. Employment type drives retention treatment (contractors vs full-time have distinct expected retention windows) + on-call eligibility (temporary staff are excluded from PagerDuty rotation by default).
columns_note: Fields on each row: `key` (enum member, stable), `display_name` (human-readable label), `slug` (URL-safe form), `sort_order` (picker sort ascending), `eligible_for_on_call` (default rotation membership hint), `default_pat_ttl_seconds` (Sanctum PAT TTL override — shorter for contractors), `retention_hold_days_override` (retention hold override; null = use module default of 90 days).

employment_types.description: External contractor with time-bounded access. Shorter default PAT TTL (30 min vs 1h) + shorter retention hold (30d vs 90d) reflects the tighter access-management posture for non-employees.
Short-term staff (interns, seasonal, backfill). Same access-tightening posture as contractor.

notes: `eligible_for_on_call` is a HINT, not a hard gate — a super_admin can still add a contractor to a rotation with explicit override.
`default_pat_ttl_seconds` is read at token-issuance time by the `identity/auth` module. Overrides the module-wide `platform-user.mfa.session_ttl_seconds` config value.

`retention_hold_days_override` on contractor + temporary rows is deliberately shorter (30d) than the default (90d). Faster hard-delete reduces the compliance footprint for staff whose employment contract explicitly bounds Academorix's data-retention obligations.
